---
title: "Group Analysis Scripts"
subtitle: "Working code from workshop groups"
---

Each working group has a subfolder here for their analysis scripts.

## Groups

| Group | Folder |
|-------|--------|
| Group 1 | `group-1/` |
| Group 2 | `group-2/` |
| Group 3 | `group-3/` |
| Group 4 | `group-4/` |

## Suggested Folder Structure

```
analysis/
├── group-1/
│   ├── 01_explore_data.R
│   ├── 02_analysis_plan.md
│   └── 03_main_analysis.R
├── group-2/
│   └── ...
```

## Guidelines

- Use descriptive filenames prefixed with a number to indicate order
- Commit regularly so group members have access to the latest version
- Save slow-running outputs as `.rds` files and commit those too
